scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.unlinkSync(f)}catch{}});const a=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'';if(a&&!a.startsWith('pnpm')){console.error('Error: use pnpm to install dependencies.');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
